queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability and risk mitigation factors.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The influence of critical or alternative existing credit histories on reducing overall credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: Empirical evidence on how negative checking account balances correlate with lower default probability in consumer lending.
